creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, but I am unable to reproduce your issue.

I guess this was tinc-devel-1.1pre18_1 build against the OpenSSL in base:

Please make sure after upgrading to use an up-to-date package.

See:
https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.3R/relnotes/
[...]
OpenSSL 1.1.1l was imported into the tree.
[...]

Applications using OpenSSL need to be recompiled when OpenSSL changes.
